note: Add every completed demo here after it's built. This registry is checked BEFORE building anything new. A match means we customize an existing solution rather than building from scratch — saving hours. Partial matches mean we can use components. source field: 'manual' = built outside the deploy tool (no URL expected), 'demo_tool' = auto-deployed by deploy.py (Railway URL available).
